name: Bernieriidae
description: Bernieriidae is a family of small passerine birds endemic to Madagascar. They occupy a wide range of forest habitats and exhibit diverse foraging behaviors from canopy gleaning to understory skulking.

children.name: Bernieria
children.description: A monotypic genus of large warbler with a long, stout bill endemic to Madagascar.

children.name: Bernieria madagascariensis
children.description: The Long-billed Bernieria is a large, olive-green warbler with a long, powerful bill and pale yellow underparts. It forages in the understory and mid-story of lowland and montane forests across Madagascar.

children.name: Cryptosylvicola
children.description: A monotypic genus of cryptic warbler found in eastern Madagascar's forests.

children.name: Cryptosylvicola randrianasoloi
children.description: The Thicket Warbler is a small, drab olive-brown bird with a pale throat and a short tail. It skulks in dense undergrowth in the rainforests of eastern Madagascar.

children.name: Hartertula
children.description: A monotypic genus of small, active warbler with a distinctive wedge-shaped tail.

children.name: Hartertula flavoviridis
children.description: The Wedge-tailed Jery is a small, greenish-yellow warbler with a long, graduated tail. It actively forages in mixed-species flocks in the mid-story of humid forests in eastern Madagascar.

children.name: Xanthomixis
children.description: A genus of small, olive-and-yellow warblers endemic to Madagascar's forests.

children.name: Xanthomixis zosterops
children.description: The Spectacled Tetraka is a small, olive-green warbler with a prominent white eye-ring and yellow underparts. It inhabits rainforest understory across eastern Madagascar, feeding on insects.

children.name: Xanthomixis apperti
children.description: A tetraka with yellow underparts endemic to southwestern Madagascar.

children.name: Xanthomixis eremita
children.description: A tetraka with white throat from the spiny forests of southern Madagascar.

children.name: Xanthomixis cinereiceps
children.description: A tetraka with grey crown from the rainforests of eastern Madagascar.

children.name: Xanthomixis olivacea
children.description: An olive tetraka from eastern Madagascar.

children.name: Xanthomixis tenella
children.description: A tetraka with slender bill from northeastern Madagascar.

children.name: Thamnornis
children.description: A monotypic genus of warbler endemic to Madagascar.

children.name: Thamnornis chloropetoides
children.description: A small warbler with greenish-yellow underparts endemic to the spiny forests of southern Madagascar.
